moments.title: Commonwealth Games kick off in Glasgow
moments.blurb: The 2026 Commonwealth Games, officially known as Glasgow 2026, are set to begin on July 23rd, bringing athletes from across the Commonwealth to Scotland for a multi-sport event until August 2nd.

angles.name: Opening Ceremony Excitement
angles.copy: Glasgow, are you ready? The Commonwealth Games kick off this Thursday! Get set for two weeks of incredible sport and a city buzzing with energy. #Glasgow2026

angles.name: Team UK Spirit
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are almost here! Which sport are you most excited to watch Team UK compete in? Let us know!

moments.title: Love Island 2026 Grand Finale
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated final of Love Island 2026 is confirmed to air on Monday, July 27th, on ITV2 and ITVX, where the winning couple will be crowned after eight weeks of villa drama.

angles.name: Who will win?
angles.copy: It's almost time! The Love Island final is just days away. Who's your money on to win the £50k and steal the show? #LoveIsland

angles.name: Villa Recap
angles.copy: Eight weeks, countless bombshells, and endless drama. Love Island 2026 wraps up next Monday. What's been your favourite moment from the series?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival wraps up today
moments.blurb: TRNSMT Festival concludes today, July 20th, at Glasgow Green, after a weekend of performances from headliners like Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival Finish
angles.copy: That's a wrap for TRNSMT 2026! What an incredible weekend at Glasgow Green. Who was your highlight of the festival?

angles.name: Best Set
angles.copy: From Kasabian to Richard Ashcroft, TRNSMT delivered! What was the best set you caught this weekend?

moments.title: Official Singles Chart update
moments.blurb: The Official Singles Chart Top 100 for July 16-22, 2026, sees Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holding the number one spot, with Oasis' 'Wonderwall' and Baddiel, Skinner & Lightning Seeds' 'Three Lions' making a strong resurgence due to football fever.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still at #1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are dominating the charts with 'Rein Me In'. What a track!

angles.name: Football Anthems
angles.copy: World Cup fever brings 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' back into the Top 3! Which classic football anthem gets you hyped?

moments.title: Latitude Festival begins
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23rd to 26th, offering a diverse lineup of music, arts, and comedy.

angles.name: Festival Prep
angles.copy: Get ready, Suffolk! Latitude Festival kicks off this Thursday. Who are you most excited to see at Henham Park?

angles.name: Arts & Music
angles.copy: Music, comedy, and arts all in one place! Latitude Festival is just days away. What's on your must-see list?

moments.title: Truck Festival gets underway
moments.blurb: Truck Festival, the 'anti-major' indie festival, takes place from July 23rd to 26th at Hill Farm, Steventon, Oxfordshire, featuring a lineup of indie, alternative, and rock acts.

angles.name: Indie Vibes
angles.copy: Truck Festival is almost here! Ready for a weekend of the best indie and alternative music at Hill Farm? #TruckFestival

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Just a few days until Truck Festival opens its gates in Oxfordshire! Who's joining the 'anti-major' party this weekend?

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger! Still got those moves. What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Mick Jagger, who turns 83 on Sunday! A true legend of rock and roll. #RollingStones

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: Iconic guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his unique blend of rock, Latin, and jazz, celebrates his 79th birthday today, July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Carlos Santana! That guitar tone is unmistakable. #Santana

angles.name: Birthday Grooves
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the maestro, Carlos Santana, who turns 79 today! Put on 'Smooth' and celebrate the guitar god.

moments.title: Annie Lennox turns 72
moments.blurb: The iconic Scottish singer-songwriter and Eurythmics frontwoman, Annie Lennox, celebrates her 72nd birthday on July 25th.

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 72nd Birthday to the incredible Annie Lennox! A true force in music history. What's your favourite Eurythmics hit?

angles.name: Scottish Star
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 72nd Birthday to Scotland's own Annie Lennox on Saturday! Still 'Sweet Dreams' are made of her music. #ScottishMusic

moments.title: Kate Bush turns 68
moments.blurb: The enigmatic and influential British singer-songwriter Kate Bush celebrates her 68th birthday on July 30th.

angles.name: Music Visionary
angles.copy: Happy 68th Birthday to the legendary Kate Bush this Thursday! Her music continues to inspire generations. #KateBush

angles.name: Iconic Artist
angles.copy: Celebrating the unique artistry of Kate Bush, who turns 68 on July 30th. What's your favourite track from this incredible talent?

moments.title: Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival approaches
moments.blurb: The Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival, known for its eclectic music and family-friendly atmosphere, returns to the Scottish Highlands from July 30th to August 1st.

angles.name: Highlands Festival
angles.copy: The Highlands are calling! Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival kicks off next Thursday. Who's heading to Bella?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Get ready for three days of music, arts, and family fun! Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival is almost here. #TartanHeart

moments.title: Kendal Calling celebrates 21st anniversary
moments.blurb: Kendal Calling, the beloved festival in the Lake District, returns to Lowther Deer Park from July 30th to August 2nd, celebrating its 21st anniversary with a diverse lineup.

angles.name: Festival Anniversary
angles.copy: Happy 21st Birthday, Kendal Calling! The Lake District festival is back next week. Who's joining the celebrations?

angles.name: Lake District Party
angles.copy: Camping, music, and good vibes! Kendal Calling kicks off next Thursday in the beautiful Lake District. What are you looking forward to most?

moments.title: WOMAD Festival opens
moments.blurb: The World of Music, Arts and Dance (WOMAD) Festival takes place from July 23rd to 26th, celebrating global cultures with a vibrant mix of music, dance, and workshops.

angles.name: Global Rhythms
angles.copy: Get ready to explore the 'World of Music, Arts and Dance'! WOMAD Festival begins this Thursday. Who's excited for a global celebration?

angles.name: Cultural Experience
angles.copy: From world music to workshops, WOMAD Festival offers a unique cultural experience starting July 23rd. Immerse yourself!
